entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A hardy warmseason cereal crop cultivated for food, feed, fodder, and brewing, known for gluten-free grains and resilience to harsh conditions

entities.name: ASIA AND AFRICA
entities.description: The semi-arid tropics where pearl millet is primarily cultivated

entities.name: GLUTEN-FREE GRAINS
entities.description: Grains of pearl millet that lack gluten and possess high nutrient quality

entities.name: LOW FERTILITY
entities.description: A harsh soil condition that pearl millet can withstand

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Unpredictable precipitation patterns that pearl millet can withstand

entities.name: ACIDIC SOILS
entities.description: Soils with low pH that pearl millet can withstand

entities.name: SALINE SOILS
entities.description: Soils with high salt content that pearl millet can withstand

entities.name: HOTTEST CLIMATES
entities.description: Extreme temperature environments that pearl millet can withstand

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Biological pressures, such as diseases, that threaten the yield potential of pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A biotic stress/disease that affects pearl millet

entities.name: BLAST DISEASES
entities.description: A biotic stress/disease that affects pearl millet

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-biological pressures, such as drought and heat, that threaten the yield potential of pearl millet

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An abiotic stress that threatens pearl millet yield

entities.name: SEEDLING-STAGE HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Heat stress occurring during the seedling stage of pearl millet

entities.name: FLOWERING-STAGE HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Heat stress occurring during the flowering stage of pearl millet

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The maximum yield capacity of pearl millet, threatened by biotic and abiotic stresses

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to withstand biotic and abiotic stresses

entities.name: NOVEL GENES
entities.description: New genetic sequences sought from diverse sources to improve stress tolerance

entities.name: CROP WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild species related to pearl millet that serve as a source of novel genes and genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The total genetic variation within pearl millet, which can be diversified using wild relatives

entities.name: STAGE-GATE PROCESS
entities.description: A proposed process for the efficient management of prebreeding programs

entities.name: PREBREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs that use crop wild relatives as a source of germplasm diversity and improvement

entities.name: GERMPLASM DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic resources available for crop improvement

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that allow a crop to withstand climate-related stresses, improved by capturing specific alleles

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overall process of enhancing crop traits for better yield and resilience

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION OF NEW TRAITS
entities.description: The process of identifying and describing new traits in germplasm for crop improvement

entities.name: IDENTIFICATION AND INTRODUCTION OF GENES
entities.description: The process of finding and incorporating genes of interest into breeding lines and varieties

entities.name: ELITE BREEDING LINES
entities.description: High-performing genetic lines used in pearl millet breeding

entities.name: COMMERCIAL VARIETIES
entities.description: Pearl millet varieties developed for commercial farming

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: Pearl millet hybrids developed for commercial use
